args.comment: Reviewed advisory for CVE-2026-30117; beginning remediation.

args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation flaw in the token refresh path, affecting auth-api and session-store. TCK-9902 opened and in-progress.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: Patch plan confirmed: auth-api → v5.8.4, session-store → v2.2.9. Deploys proceeding now.

args.text: Both services confirmed patched: auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: auth-api and session-store are confirmed patched at v5.8.4 and v2.2.9 respectively.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of tonight's security maintenance (CVE-2026-30117 remediation), all sessions have been invalidated. Please sign in again.
